title: Bournemouth held to frustrating goalless draw by Brentford
fullText: Bournemouth hit the post twice and have a goal disallowed as they draw 0-0 against Brentford at the Vitality Stadium in the Premier League. MATCH REPORT: AFC Bournemouth 0-0 BrentfordAvailable to UK users only.
summary: Bournemouth hit the post twice and have a goal disallowed as they draw 0-0 against Brentford at the Vitality Stadium in the Premier League.
